name: Impossible Quiche Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 18 muffin cups, each measuring 2 1/2 inches in diameter by 1 1/4 inches deep.
3. In a blender or hand beater, beat together sour cream, Bisquick, milk, eggs, and Worcestershire sauce until smooth, about 15 seconds or 1 minute.
4. Spoon about 2 tablespoons of the batter into each muffin cup.
5. Mix the remaining ingredients and sprinkle 1 tablespoon over the batter in each cup.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Loosen the sides of the tarts from the pan and remove them.
8. Remove any remaining appetizers.
This recipe makes 18 appetizers.
